why: Section changes were routing through broader hub refresh work than the interaction required.
change: Keep the journal shell mounted, toggle button active state in place, replace only the active section body.

why: Selecting a spell rebuilt live magic UI even though only selection state changed.
change: Retag the affected spell cards and status labels in place.

why: Filter changes were refreshing more live UI than the filter interaction needed.

why: Provisioner buy/sell toggles were calling showShopModal() again and rebuilding the service body.
